Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver-embedded cane, halved top hat, dark gold member cufflinks
Klein Moretti.role: Khoy University graduate and probationary member of the Nighthawks
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Officially joined the club; now wearing a halved top hat and club cufflinks.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: formal suit, white shirt, black trousers, halved top hat

Hanass Vincent.hair_style: thick and hard brown hair, each strand standing firmly like porcupine spikes
Hanass Vincent.face_description: middle-aged face with prominent dark circles under the eyes
Hanass Vincent.visual_anchor: middle-aged man with spiky brown hair like porcupine spikes and deep dark circles, wearing a black classic Victorian robe
Hanass Vincent.color_palette: charcoal grey, deep blue, crisp white
Hanass Vincent.distinguishing_features: thick Awwa accent, dark red aura (worried)
Hanass Vincent.accessories: Silver-coated mirror used for magic mirror divination
Hanass Vincent.source_notes: Physical appearance, clothing, and accent confirmed during the divination class.

Edward Steve.primary_clothing: White long-sleeved shirt, black buttoned vest, dark Victorian trousers
Edward Steve.face_description: Youthful and friendly face with approachable features and a welcoming, self-deprecating smile.
Edward Steve.visual_anchor: young man with a polite smile wearing a white Victorian shirt and a black wool vest
Edward Steve.color_palette: stark white, deep black, slate grey
Edward Steve.distinguishing_features: Often speaks with self-deprecating humor regarding his divination skills
Edward Steve.source_notes: Mentioned waving his cane while speaking to Glacis in Chapter 49.
Edward Steve.era_clothing_lock: white Victorian shirt and a black wool vest

Glacis.primary_clothing: formal suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.face_description: Slightly dark skin with dark green pupils, topped with soft light yellow hair
Glacis.visual_anchor: frail male with soft blond hair and a monocle hanging over a formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie
Glacis.color_palette: black, white, light yellow, dark green
Glacis.distinguishing_features: Slightly dark skin, dark green pupils
Glacis.source_notes: Chapter 49 provides specific details: soft blond hair, monocle, black bow tie, and a formal suit.
Glacis.era_clothing_lock: formal Victorian suit with a black bow tie, monocle hanging from a chain, polished leather shoes

Angelica.hair_style: long hair coiled in a mature, elegant style
Angelica.visual_anchor: mature and elegant woman with brownish-yellow long hair coiled, wearing a Victorian attendant's outfit
Angelica.source_notes: Described as a beautiful lady with a pleasant smile in Chapter 49.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Roselle Gustav.face_description: handsome and charismatic face with an air of authority
Roselle Gustav.visual_anchor: middle-aged male, elaborate emperor attire, charismatic and authoritative presence
Roselle Gustav.color_palette: imperial red, gold, white, navy blue
Roselle Gustav.distinguishing_features: Wrote his secret diary using simplified Chinese characters; created secret cards hiding the twenty-two paths of the divine
Roselle Gustav.faction: Emperor; creator of the Blasphemy Slate-derived 22-card system and the tarot cards as a gaming cover
Roselle Gustav.role: historical figure — Intis Republic's Consul, later self-proclaimed Emperor Caesar; inventor of the steam engine, tarot divination, and contemporary card game systems; recognized by the God of Craftsmanship; assassinated in year 1198 of the Fifth Epoch at the White Maple Palace by combined forces of the Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun, the Sauron family (former Intis royal family), and aristocrats
Roselle Gustav.source_notes: Klein recognizes the diary symbols as simplified Chinese characters; Audrey mentions the secret cards.

Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female, pale skin, long flowing black hair, wearing flowing dark robes
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Awoken at the end of the Second Epoch. Her full title includes Mistress of Repose and Silence.
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Text details her awakening and full titles.

Dunn Smith.primary_clothing: white shirt, black vest, black trench coat, hat
Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text confirms his official rank as a high-ranking inspector and his use of gloves during the investigation.
